arxiv-export/export.sh: latexmk (rc=0) produced no main.bbl in the bundle
"}). The generic plugin firewall did not discover/run the vendored arxiv-export plugin to produce a flattened self-contained bundle from the real buffer.

tests.title: Export PDF runs the configured lualatex plugin and carries the witnesses
